## ✅ Checklist
Before submitting, make sure you've:
- [ ] Tested the code locally
- [ ] Run `black src/` to format code
- [ ] Run `flake8 src/` and fixed any issues
- [ ] Added comments explaining complex logic
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
- [ ] Verified all example code runs without errors
